description: Get dressed in these heels from catwalk. The metal clasped bow lends a dose of chic style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Patent leather uppers for comfort and durability Metal clasped bow for added style Soft feel lining for extra comfort Midsole Leather lined ergonomic footbed for added style and comfort Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
